name: Trap Trek: Ultimate Other Me
short_description: A super-challenging action game where you use the Avatar System to spot traps and aim for the goal in each stage.
detailed_description:
What You Gain from This Game

・Incredible Sense of Accomplishment: Experience the thrill of overcoming tough challenges.
・Real Growth: Watch your skills improve as you repeatedly tackle difficult obstacles.
・Enhanced Problem-Solving: Develop strategies to conquer even the toughest puzzles through trial and error.

Game Features

Tired of Unfair Traps?
Use the Avatar to your advantage! It lets you see trap locations ahead of time, helping you plan your moves strategically. But don’t be fooled—knowing the traps doesn't make them any easier to avoid!

・Auto-save feature: Play progress is automatically saved so you can resume from the base at any time.
However, if you have not found the base, you can go to the previous stage when you find the base.
・Realistic Physics: Be cautious when dropping from heights. Rolling can cause your character to hit their head and die, so proceed carefully!

Hidden Treasures in Each Stage
Each stage has hidden coins to discover. Collect them all, and you'll unlock a super-challenging bonus stage at your home base. Hunt down those coins and take on the ultimate challenge!

Recommended Controls: Keyboard & Mouse

Controller Instructions:
Left Stick: Move
Press Left Stick: Run
Right Stick: Camera/Mouse control
X: Jump
Square: Roll
Triangle: Use Avatar
Circle: Kick/Confirm
Share Button: Open Menu/Select Item
